source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit for the proposal implementation so the evaluator has the full-search generator hook and CLI.

requested_items.objective: Regenerate endpoint-measured Llama7B topology-derived dense-tile schedule rows and apply practical SRAM-bank, local-buffer, and endpoint service caps before ranking.

expected_result.reason: The result should show whether practical SRAM-bank and endpoint caps change the best topology/scheduler point compared with retained-frontier cap postprocessing.
